# ci/cd: add new linters support from v1.46.0 and up golangci-lint to v1.46.2

See https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases/tag/v1.46.0

```
b8c061e Add execinquery linter (#2677)
333187c Add nonamedreturns linter (#2701)
89e6cd6 Add nosprintfhostport linter (#2749)
```

check `run linters` shows them

related to kamilsk/golangci-lint/issues/64
